positive: Stylized, intricate geometric mountain range silhouette viewed against a vibrant sunset gradient. The foreground contains abstract, simplified woodland elements and stylized celestial bodies like crescent moons and shooting stars. Emphasis on bold, clean lines and strong contrast between the deep blue/indigo mountain silhouettes and the warm gradient background (orange, magenta, gold). Composition should be perfectly centered and repeatable for large apparel printing. Flat illustration style meets Art Deco architecture influences. Crisp vector look, suitable for single-color or two-tone screen printing.
negative: blurry, noisy, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, messy, dirty, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, photo-realistic, deep shadows, gradient banding, gradient noise
